title: The Faustus Project
company: Half Trick Theatre in association with Benjamin Alborough
description: An actor makes a deal with the devil. This new version of Christopher Marlowe's Doctor Faustus features a very special guest actor taking on the leading role for one night only. Having never before rehearsed with the rest of the cast, they face down the fiendish challenges of our devilish ensemble, with mind games, pranks, and cunning surprises galore. For them: an actor's worst nightmare. For the audience: ringside seats to the ultimate theatrical torture. ★★★★ (List)

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
